name: mood-log
_note: mental-health.mood-log is a LENS_ACTIONS macro (server/domains/mentalhealth.js, registered via registerLensAction → PATH 3 / domains/index.js). It is in-memory (globalThis._concordSTATE.mentalHealthLens.moods, a per-user Map), so it is NOT enumerated by the runMacro-based assassin (which walks MACROS only). These invariants describe the {ok,result} envelope verified by server/tests/mental-health-lens-macros.test.js. FAIL-CLOSED money/clinical guard: mood must round into 1-5 — Infinity/1e308/NaN/non-numeric strings reject as 'mood must be 1–5', so no poisoned mood value can enter the substrate. No user-supplied clinical data is fabricated; every value the lens shows is a real logged entry.
